## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature or role template
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — build/deps/config
- [ ] `security` — security-related change

## Related Issue
Closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My branch targets `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test` in affected packages)
- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, or credentials included
- [ ] Role templates (if any) validate against `role-template.schema.json`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] CLAUDE.md naming conventions followed (kebab-case files, lowercase dept IDs)
- [ ] Security model is not weakened (OutputGate, identity tokens, audit trail intact)
